title: Dimensional Brightness Control
description: Adds settings that alter each individual dimensions brightness.
body:
**This mod adds three sliders for controlling the individual brightness levels in each of the three dimensions.**

It uses a mixin so it may not be compatable with other brightness changing mods.

If you are using sodium to get the settings, press Shift + P in video settings.

The original brightness slider will no longer edit the brightness levels, it will however display the current dimension and it's brightness level you are in.
